item.title: My week
item.description:
Every week I make a wish that I will spend the next week more productively and interestingly. Surely, you have already noticed this in my regular posts.

As for this week, it’s hard to say whether it worked out this time.

On the one hand, I did not make much progress in my studies this week, although I still answered in class and did all my homework.

On the other hand, I was able to achieve the goal that I set myself a week ago. I went to my hometown Bryansk and met my friends here. I was on two birthdays and one more is coming, so now I’m thinking about a present.

Spring is in full swing and summer is just around the corner! I think many of you are tired, as am I. I assure you that very soon we will be able to relax and take care of ourselves and loved ones. But it takes a little more effort.

Thank you for your attention.

Best wishes, Nastya.

item.title: My week
item.description:
Two weeks ago, I decided to spend the next week better than the previous one. And a week ago I promised that this week would be more colorful and productive…

But did I manage to keep my promise?

I didn’t waste any time this week and I’m very happy with that. I studied a lot, did all the tasks and even had time to walk 20 km with my friends. But unfortunately, I fell ill this week.

Is it possible to call this week productive?

It seems to me that it is very important to find time for rest and communication, so this aspect is not only about working. I succeed.

Will the next week more productive?!

I’m not sure I can be more productive next week, however I should because of the amount of tasks I was given. So I’ll try to do my best next week.

Thank you for your attention! See you soon!

item.title: My week
item.description:
My story

Hello everyone! It is so nice to know you are interested in my life. In this short artcicle I am going to tell you about my past week.

So, this week I wasn’t as productive as on the previoust one. I fall a bit ill and tried to do two and a half labs, I did a lot of homework and, thus, wasn’t able to sleep enough.

At the same time, I went to my hometown and visited my family with friends.

Hope that it was interesting for you to read.

See you next week!

item.title: My week
item.description:
My Story

Hello everyone! It is so nice to know you are interested in my life. In this short artcicle I am going to tell you about my past week.

So, this week I was very productive. I did two labs, took part in university concert, did a lot of homework and even slept well enough.

At the same time, I had time to walk with my friends, go on dates, celebrate the International Women Day and even go to the concert of my favourite boys band.

Hope that it was interesting for you to read.

See you next week!
